title: Entity Banners
description: A mod strongly inspired by Terraria, which adds entity-specific banners that increase damage and defense against the entity for players nearby.
body: # Entity Banners A mod strongly inspired by Terraria, which adds entity-specific banners that increase damage and defense against the entity for players nearby. ## About the banners The Entity Banners are a set of customizable banners dropped by entities upon every 50th kill. Each valid entity has its own banner and when placed in the world the banner will give increased damage and defense against its entity type to all players inside its effect radius (48 blocks). All the values above can be changed in the mod's config file. ## Mod compatibility Since banners are automatically registered every time a new valid entity is registered, and they inherit their colors from the entities spawn egg, this mod has full compatibility with other mods that adds custom entities (When a valid entity doesn't have a spawn egg the banner will default to black). If you don't want an entity to have a banner you can blacklist it in the config file. Compatibility with [Terrarian Slimes](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/terrarian-slimes "Terrarian Slimes") shown above. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/entity-banners](https://github.com/lucaargolo/entity-banners) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
